channel.title: GitHub Ruby Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Ruby in GitHub

item.title: rails/rails
item.description: Ruby on Rails

item.title: Freika/dawarich
item.description: Self-hosted alternative to Google Location History (Google Maps Timeline)

item.title: chatwoot/chatwoot
item.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬

item.title: kilimchoi/engineering-blogs
item.description: A curated list of engineering blogs

item.title: opf/openproject
item.description: OpenProject is the leading open source project management software.

item.title: discourse/discourse
item.description: A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple.

item.title: TheOdinProject/theodinproject
item.description: Main Website for The Odin Project

item.title: sidekiq/sidekiq
item.description: Simple, efficient background processing for Ruby

item.title: spree/spree
item.description: An open source eCommerce platform giving you full control and customizability. Modular and API-first. Multi-vendor, multi-tenant, multi-store, multi-currency, multi-language. Built using Ruby on Rails. Developed by @vendo-dev

item.title: dependabot/dependabot-core
item.description: 🤖 Dependabot's core logic for creating update PRs.

item.title: zammad/zammad
item.description: Zammad is a web based open source helpdesk/customer support system

item.title: rapid7/metasploit-framework
item.description: Metasploit Framework

item.title: vcr/vcr
item.description: Record your test suite's HTTP interactions and replay them during future test runs for fast, deterministic, accurate tests.

item.title: carrierwaveuploader/carrierwave
item.description: Classier solution for file uploads for Rails, Sinatra and other Ruby web frameworks

item.title: ruby/debug
item.description: Debugging functionality for Ruby

item.title: heartcombo/devise
item.description: Flexible authentication solution for Rails with Warden.

item.title: hotwired/turbo-rails
item.description: Use Turbo in your Ruby on Rails app

item.title: brianmario/mysql2
item.description: A modern, simple and very fast Mysql library for Ruby - binding to libmysql

item.title: rubocop/rubocop
item.description: A Ruby static code analyzer and formatter, based on the community Ruby style guide.

item.title: getsentry/sentry-ruby
item.description: Sentry SDK for Ruby

item.title: teamcapybara/capybara
item.description: Acceptance test framework for web applications

item.title: rails/solid_queue
item.description: Database-backed Active Job backend

item.title: github/choosealicense.com
item.description: A site to provide non-judgmental guidance on choosing a license for your open source project

item.title: rails-api/active_model_serializers
item.description: ActiveModel::Serializer implementation and Rails hooks
